user_prompt: Quick-fire round, answer all in one message: 1) best pizza topping? 2) how do black holes form? 3) should I quit my job tomorrow? 4) and one thing about stress management, mindfulness, and healthy routines?
model_response:
1) Pepperoni! 🍕  
2) Black holes form from the remnants of massive stars that collapse under their own gravity after exhausting their nuclear fuel.  
3) Consider your reasons and make sure you have a plan before making any big decisions!  
4) Practice mindfulness by taking a few minutes each day to focus on your breath and be present. 🧘‍♂️
